scripts.prepare: bash -lc 'if command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then pre-commit install && pre-commit install --hook-type pre-push; else echo "pre-commit not found; skipping hook install"; fi'
scripts.format:allium: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/format.js
scripts.format:allium:check: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/format.js --check
scripts.diagram:allium: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/diagram.js
scripts.trace:allium: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/trace.js
scripts.drift:check: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/drift.js
scripts.drift:allium: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/drift.js
scripts.check: npm run --workspace extensions/allium build && node extensions/allium/dist/src/check.js
